attacking_style: Does not initiate attacks; attempts to follow moves but lacks the climbing power to sustain efforts when gradients increase or pace intensifies on categorized climbs.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish clear team tactical patterns. Appears to operate opportunistically in breakaways rather than as protected rider.
terrain_preference: Can handle technical descents and flatter breakaway scenarios; exposed significantly on sustained climbs where pure climbing power is required.
vulnerability: Consistently dropped early on final climbs before main GC attacks begin, suggesting insufficient threshold power for high-intensity mountain stages.
key_patterns: Fades on climbs when pace intensifies, unable to follow attacks (2 observations).
Shows technical descending capability but cannot compensate for climbing deficiencies (2 observations).
Dropped before main selection occurs, indicating lack of top-end climbing power (2 observations).
form_trajectory: negative: Both observations show inability to sustain position when climbing intensity increases, suggesting limitations persist across season
built_from: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 18
